description: Fetch the top topics from the Maimai community hot-rank page, or search for hot posts by keyword when a query is provided. Requires a logged-in Maimai session in the browser.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return. Maximum 15 in hot-rank mode, maximum 50 in search mode.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keyword. When provided, switches to hot-post search mode.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset for search mode, only effective when query is provided.
